**CrewAI** is a role-based multi-agent orchestrator. v0.x stable, MIT licensed, maintained.

Distinct because it codifies role + goal + backstory as the primary planning unit, which makes hierarchical delegation cleaner than free-form agent chats. Production deployments across several mid-market SaaS shops.

- [official] https://docs.crewai.com/
- [field report] Klarna-style customer-support pilot recap.
